title: Pizza Dip
ingredients: ½ cup of good pizza sauce
instructions:
1 can(2 ½ oz) sliced ripe olives, drained. Add more if desired.
1/3 cup finely diced red pepper
5 medium green onions, thinly sliced
½ cup finely shredded mozzarella cheese
¼ cup shredded fresh basil leaves
tortilla chips
Set oven to broil.
Mix the cream cheese, pizza sauce and garlic. Spread a thin layer of the mixture over a 12” or 13” round oven proof serving dish, using all of it.
Top with the pepperoni, olives, pepper, and onions. Sprinkle with the mozzarella cheese.
Broil 4” from the element, for 1-2 minutes or until the cheese has melted. Garnish with the basil and serve with the tortilla chips.
